question_en: List Pokemon that share a Type with Pikachu.
question_ko: 피카츄와 같은 타입을 가진 포켓몬을 알려줘.
gold_answer_en: Pokemon that have at least one type in common with Pikachu (an Electric type).
gold_answer_ko: 피카츄(전기 타입)와 같은 타입을 공유하는 포켓몬들.
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> SELECT DISTINCT ?p WHERE { d:Pikachu pk:hasType ?t . ?p pk:hasType ?t . FILTER(?p != d:Pikachu) }

question_en: How many Pokemon are there per Type?
gold_answer_en: Count of distinct Pokemon grouped by Type.
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> SELECT ?t (COUNT(DISTINCT ?p) AS ?n) WHERE { ?p pk:hasType ?t } GROUP BY ?t ORDER BY DESC(?n)

question_en: Compare Charizard and Blastoise by HP and attack.
gold_answer_en: Charizard and Blastoise side-by-side HP and attack values.
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> SELECT ?p ?hp ?atk WHERE { VALUES ?p { d:Charizard d:Blastoise } ?p pk:hp ?hp ; pk:attack ?atk . }

question_en: What does Charizard transitively evolve from?
gold_answer_en: Charizard ← Charmeleon ← Charmander (all ancestors via evolvesFrom transitive).
gold_answer_ko: 리자몽 ← 리자드 ← 파이리 (모든 조상, evolvesFrom 추이 관계).
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> SELECT DISTINCT ?ancestor WHERE { d:Charizard pk:evolvesFrom+ ?ancestor . }

question_en: Which 5 Pokemon have the highest attack?
gold_answer_en: Top 5 Pokemon sorted by attack stat descending.
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> SELECT ?p ?atk WHERE { ?p a pk:Pokemon ; pk:attack ?atk } ORDER BY DESC(?atk) LIMIT 5

question_en: How many Pokemon (including Legendary ones) come from Kanto?
question_ko: 관동 지방 출신 포켓몬은 (전설 포함) 몇 마리인가?
gold_answer_en: Count of all Pokemon (Pokemon + LegendaryPokemon via subClassOf) with fromRegion = Kanto.
gold_answer_ko: Pokemon + LegendaryPokemon(subClassOf 추론 포함)이고 fromRegion이 관동인 개수.
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?p) AS ?n) WHERE { ?p a/rdfs:subClassOf* pk:Pokemon ; pk:fromRegion d:Kanto }

question_en: Which Trainers train at least one Fire-type Pokemon?
question_ko: 불꽃 타입 포켓몬을 한 마리라도 가진 트레이너는?
gold_answer_en: Trainers whose roster includes any Pokemon with hasType = Fire.
gold_answer_ko: 보유 포켓몬 중 hasType=Fire인 트레이너 목록.
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> SELECT DISTINCT ?t WHERE { ?p pk:trainedBy ?t ; pk:hasType d:Fire . }

question_en: Which Pokemon does Ash own (via trainedBy inverse)?
gold_answer_en: Pokemon p such that p trainedBy Ash — surfaces Ash's roster.
gold_answer_ko: p trainedBy 지우 인 모든 p — 지우의 라인업.
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> SELECT DISTINCT ?p WHERE { ?p pk:trainedBy d:Ash . }

question_en: List Water-type Pokemon with attack greater than 80.
question_ko: 공격력 80 이상의 물 타입 포켓몬을 알려줘.
gold_answer_en: Pokemon p where p hasType Water and p attack > 80.
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> SELECT DISTINCT ?p ?atk WHERE { ?p pk:hasType d:Water ; pk:attack ?atk . FILTER(?atk > 80) }

question_en: Which Types is Water strong against, and which Pokemon have those Types?
question_ko: 물 타입이 강한 타입은 무엇이고, 그 타입의 포켓몬은 누구인가?
gold_answer_en: Pokemon whose hasType is in the set { t : Water strongAgainst t }.
gold_answer_ko: Water strongAgainst t 인 t 타입을 가진 포켓몬 모두.
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> SELECT DISTINCT ?weakType ?p WHERE { d:Water pk:strongAgainst ?weakType . ?p pk:hasType ?weakType . }

question_en: What is the average HP of Fire-type vs Water-type Pokemon?
question_ko: 불 타입과 물 타입 포켓몬의 평균 HP를 비교해줘.
gold_answer_en: Two average HP values, one per type.
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> SELECT ?type (AVG(?hp) AS ?avgHp) WHERE { VALUES ?type { d:Fire d:Water } ?p pk:hasType ?type ; pk:hp ?hp . } GROUP BY ?type

question_en: Which Pokemon know a Move whose Type matches one of their own Types?
question_ko: 자기 타입과 같은 타입의 기술을 가진 포켓몬은?
gold_answer_en: Pokemon p such that p hasMove m and m moveType matches one of p's hasType (STAB).
gold_answer_ko: 기술의 moveType이 자기 hasType과 같은 포켓몬 (자속 기술 보유).
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> SELECT DISTINCT ?p WHERE { ?p pk:hasType ?t ; pk:hasMove ?m . ?m pk:moveType ?t . }

question_en: What is the average HP of Legendary Pokemon compared to all Pokemon?
question_ko: 전설의 포켓몬 평균 HP와 전체 포켓몬 평균 HP를 비교해줘.
gold_answer_en: Two AVG(hp) values: one for LegendaryPokemon, one for all Pokemon (subClassOf-inferred).
gold_answer_ko: LegendaryPokemon 평균 HP vs 전체 Pokemon(subClassOf 추론 포함) 평균 HP.
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> SELECT (AVG(?hpAll) AS ?avgAll) (AVG(?hpL) AS ?avgL) WHERE { { ?pa a/rdfs:subClassOf* pk:Pokemon ; pk:hp ?hpAll } UNION { ?pl a pk:LegendaryPokemon ; pk:hp ?hpL } }

question_en: Is there an evolution path from Charmander to Charizard?
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> ASK WHERE { d:Charizard pk:evolvesFrom+ d:Charmander }

question_en: Which Region produced the most Pokemon, and what is the most common Type among them?
question_ko: 가장 많은 포켓몬을 배출한 지역은 어디이고, 그 지역의 가장 흔한 타입은 무엇인가?
gold_answer_en: Two-part: (1) Region with max COUNT(?p) via fromRegion; (2) most-frequent Type among those Pokemon.
gold_answer_ko: 두 단계: (1) fromRegion 기준 COUNT가 가장 많은 Region; (2) 그 지역 포켓몬들 중 가장 빈도 높은 hasType.
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> SELECT ?r (COUNT(DISTINCT ?p) AS ?n) WHERE { ?p pk:fromRegion ?r } GROUP BY ?r ORDER BY DESC(?n) LIMIT 1
